plan: Read required ORIS durable context, project registry, task progress, and result contract.
Run the ORIS-owned skill resolver for the runtime task id and objective.
Inspect the FastAPI app and tests for the requested /healthz/details behavior.
Verify local implementation state and preserve existing public API behavior.
Run compile and pytest checks, capturing exact logs under ORIS logs/dev_employee.
Write the structured Codex result JSON for host bridge final verification.
codex_result.design_summary: The requested read-only GET /healthz/details endpoint and pytest coverage were already present in the product repository. The endpoint returns stable service metadata from existing constants plus the current in-memory task count via len(tasks), without mutating task-board state or changing existing API behavior.

iteration_summary.result: Repository inspection found GET /healthz/details and tests already implemented with clean product git status.
System python3 compile checks passed, but system pytest was unavailable; python command was also unavailable.
iteration_summary.action: Located and used the existing product .venv interpreter for dependency-backed checks.

iteration_summary.result: Project virtualenv checks passed: compileall succeeded, pytest passed with 28 tests, and pytest -W error passed with 28 tests.
iteration_summary.action: Recorded check logs and wrote structured result JSON.

notes: No product files were changed in this Codex run because the requested endpoint and pytest coverage already existed at HEAD.
The bare python executable is not available in the sandbox; equivalent checks passed with the product virtualenv python.
An isolated pip install into /tmp was attempted after missing system pytest, but sandbox DNS/network restrictions prevented downloading dependencies.
Host bridge remains responsible for final checks, product commit/push if needed, and ORIS evidence commit.
codex_result.summary: GET /healthz/details is present and covered; local checks passed in the product virtualenv.
